queries.q: Write a lessons learned entry from the payment outage so future teams can find it
The migration project just wrapped; bank what we learned for organizational memory
Document the lesson from our failed marketplace launch in a searchable format
Our staff engineer leaves next month; capture her hard-won knowledge about the billing system before she goes
queries.notes: Knowledge capture on departure, an explicit use case

queries.q: This is the third vendor integration that slipped for the same reason; record the pattern so other teams stop hitting it
Turn the post-mortem findings from the data loss incident into a durable knowledge entry with applicability guidance
Capture what we learned about feature flags during the rollout so the platform team can reuse it
We keep relearning the same lesson about scope creep on agency projects; write it down once, properly
Create an organizational memory entry for the lesson on launching in regulated markets
After the retro, I want the one big learning preserved somewhere future teams will actually find it
queries.notes: Downstream of a retro; the durable entry is this skill's job

queries.q: Facilitate a Start/Stop/Continue retro for the team at the end of this sprint
queries.notes: The team ceremony itself is the partner's job

queries.q: We just hit the milestone; structure the team session where everyone shares what worked and what did not
queries.notes: Facilitated team reflection, not a durable knowledge entry

queries.q: Run our end-of-quarter team reflection covering what went well and what to improve, with action items and owners
queries.notes: Retro format with team action items, not organizational memory

queries.q: Based on the experiment results, should we pivot or persevere on this product direction?
Write up the readout of the completed A/B test with statistical interpretation
queries.notes: Experiment readout comes first; the transferable lesson gets banked after

queries.q: Update stakeholders on what the team accomplished and learned this quarter
Score our Q3 OKRs now that the cycle has closed
Help me debug a segfault in this C program
Write a SQL query summarizing incidents by severity per month
Plan a two week road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway
